json.description:
Sea is a global technology company in Southeast Asia, Taiwan, and Brazil. Our mission is to better the lives of the consumers and small businesses of our region with technology.

Our businesses include:

Shopee, the largest pan-regional e-commerce platform in Southeast Asia and Taiwan, and a leading platform in Brazil. Launched in 2015, Shopee was designed to be mobile-first and highly social, offering buyers and sellers a trusted and enjoyable shopping experience. In 2024, Shopee recorded close to 11 billion orders, and a GMV of over $100 billion.

Garena, a global leading online games developer and publisher with a global footprint across more than 160 markets. Free Fire, Garena’s self-developed mobile battle royale title, is the most downloaded mobile game in its genre for six consecutive years, and was also the world’s most downloaded mobile game in 2019, 2021, and again in 2023 and 2024. Garena exclusively licenses and publishes hit titles from global partners - such as Arena of Valor, Call of Duty: Mobile, and EA Sports FC Online - in selected markets globally. Garena is also a leading esports organiser and hosts some of the world’s biggest esports events.

Monee, a leading digital payments and financial services provider in Southeast Asia. Monee’s offerings include mobile wallet services, payment processing, credit, banking, and related digital financial services and products. These services and products are offered under ShopeePay, SPayLater, and other brands in the region.

Sea is a Singapore company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol ‘SE’. Our IPO in October 2017 was the largest US public listing by a Southeast Asian technology company at the time.

company_updates.description:
Today, we are proud to announce the establishment of Sea's AI Centre of Excellence (AI CoE) in Singapore, with the support of Digital Industry Singapore (DISG), a joint office by Singapore Economic Development Board (EDB), Enterprise Singapore, and IMDA.

The AI CoE reinforces our long-term commitment to building a proprietary technology stack and advancing our ambition to become an AI-native company. It will focus on three strategic areas:

• Foundational AI — advancing foundation model development, evaluation, and internal tooling
• Scalable Deployment — translating R&D into production-ready solutions at scale
• AI-Native Talent — nurturing a pool of AI-native talent and new operating models

Over the next three years, we expect to create at least 100 R&D and innovation-centric roles in Singapore, spanning AI research, engineering, and product development. This work builds on our in-house AI stack — including Compass Max v3.5, our 245-billion-parameter large language model tailored for Southeast Asian languages and e-commerce, already powering AI features across Shopee today.

As Forrest Li, our Chairman and CEO, put it: "We see AI as a foundational capability that strengthens how we build innovative products, operate at a global scale, and create value for the countless communities we serve."

Thank you to DISG and our partners in Singapore's AI ecosystem. We're excited to build what comes next — from Singapore, for the world.

Read more about the announcement here: https://lnkd.in/gHqftXET

At Sea, we have always believed in the fundamental power of technology to improve lives and create long-term value for the communities we serve.

Today, we’re pleased to share that we are expanding our strategic partnership with Google to advance AI innovation across our businesses.

As AI continues to reshape industries, this partnership combines Google’s AI leadership with Sea’s innovative ecosystem and deep understanding of local markets.. Together, we will explore practical and responsible applications of AI across Garena, Shopee, and Monee — from enhancing gamer experiences and advancing agentic commerce, to strengthening digital financial services infrastructure across Southeast Asia and Latin America.

We believe that such a partnership on AI can help unlock meaningful opportunities in our markets and make emerging technologies more accessible to the digitally underserved.

Read more about the announcement here: 
https://lnkd.in/gJUHnntn

In August 2025, we announced the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with OpenAI to advance the use of artificial intelligence (AI) across Southeast Asia. Today, we are excited to share the next step in this collaboration.

Building on the success of our earlier promotion between Shopee’s VIP program and ChatGPT, we are excited to announce that we’re expanding this offer by bringing ChatGPT Go to even more Shopee VIP subscribers across Indonesia, Malaysia, the Philippines, Thailand, and Vietnam, starting from the  12.12 Birthday Sale. Additionally, from January 2026, we will further extend the benefits of ChatGPT Go to all Shopee users across these markets.

Collaborations with consumer AI companies such as OpenAI help reinforce our company’s mission of enhancing the lives of consumers and small businesses through technology. By bringing meaningful AI touchpoints and experiences closer to the communities we serve, we hope to empower our users to realize the benefits of new technology like AI in their everyday digital journeys. 

Read more about the announcement here: https://lnkd.in/gYQpVY_K

Sea and OpenAI are excited to announce the launch of the Sea x OpenAI Codex Hackathon in Singapore on 6 June 2026. This marks the start of a first-of-its-kind regional hackathon series, bringing together the best and brightest AI builders from across APAC to create innovative new products that have the potential to shape the experiences of millions.

Singapore is the first stop for this regional hackathon series across APAC. This one-day hackathon invites experienced builders who are familiar with AI coding agents, such as Codex, to tackle ambitious problem statements and push the boundaries of what's possible alongside like-minded innovators.

Builders will come together for a day of building across three directions:
• Autonomous & Adaptive AI
• AI-Native Products & Operations
• Deep Domain AI

With only 40 team slots available, this is an exclusive opportunity to build alongside the region's best.

Prizes:
• 🥇 30,000 USD in OpenAI API credits
• 🥈 15,000 USD in OpenAI API credits
• 🥉 5,000 USD in OpenAI API credits
• 12 months of ChatGPT Pro for all members of the top 5 teams

Registrations are open until 28 May 2026 (Thursday).

Sign up here 👉🏻 https://luma.com/kv0kks2a

OpenAI Developers

Additionally, from January 2026, we will further extend the benefits of ChatGPT Go to all Shopee users across these markets.

Collaborations with consumer AI companies such as OpenAI help reinforce our company’s mission of enhancing the lives of consumers and small businesses through technology. By bringing meaningful AI touchpoints and experiences closer to the communities we serve, we hope to empower our users to realize the benefits of new technology like AI in their everyday digital journeys.
